languages.text: "Прошу вас, отключитесь от когитаторов и направьте внимание на вычисление воздушных атак. Технотранс уменьшает вашу бдительность".
"Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."
languages.original_text: "Прошу вас, отключитесь от когитаторов и направьте внимание на вычисление воздушных атак. Технотранс уменьшает вашу бдительность".

traits.locale_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."
"Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."
"Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

languages.text: “请断开与沉思者的连接，将注意力转向计算空袭轨迹。你的技术恍惚正在妨碍你的警觉性。”
languages.original_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

traits.locale_text: “请断开与沉思者的连接，将注意力转向计算空袭轨迹。你的技术恍惚正在妨碍你的警觉性。”

languages.text: « Veuillez vous déconnecter des cogitateurs et reporter votre attention sur le calcul des attaques aériennes. Votre technotranse nuit à votre vigilance. »
languages.original_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

traits.locale_text: « Veuillez vous déconnecter des cogitateurs et reporter votre attention sur le calcul des attaques aériennes. Votre technotranse nuit à votre vigilance. »

languages.text: "Kavramsayarlarla bağlantıyı kes ve dikkatini hava saldırılarını hesaplamaya ver. Tekno transın, teyakkuzuna ket vuruyor."
languages.original_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

traits.locale_text: "Kavramsayarlarla bağlantıyı kes ve dikkatini hava saldırılarını hesaplamaya ver. Tekno transın, teyakkuzuna ket vuruyor."

languages.text: «Desconéctese de los cogitadores y dirija su atención a calcular el bombardeo aéreo. Su tecnotrance reduce su vigilancia».
languages.original_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

traits.locale_text: «Desconéctese de los cogitadores y dirija su atención a calcular el bombardeo aéreo. Su tecnotrance reduce su vigilancia».

languages.text: "Bitte trennt Eure Verbindung mit den Cogitatoren und richtet Eure Aufmerksamkeit auf die Berechnung der Luftangriffe. Eure Tech-Trance mindert Eure Wachsamkeit."
languages.original_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte trennt Eure Verbindung mit den Cogitatoren und richtet Eure Aufmerksamkeit auf die Berechnung der Luftangriffe. Eure Tech-Trance mindert Eure Wachsamkeit."

languages.text: 「思考器から離れて、空襲の計算に集中してください。テクノロジーの恍惚状態は、警戒心を鈍らせています。」
languages.original_text: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."

traits.locale_text: 「思考器から離れて、空襲の計算に集中してください。テクノロジーの恍惚状態は、警戒心を鈍らせています。」
